titleStmt.title: SII 15.58: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 58. (B.K. No. 45 of 1929-30.) MIṆAJIGI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the village chāvaḍi.
The record is dated Śaka 1107 (current), Krōdhi, Kārttika ba. amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1184 A.D., November 5, when there occurred a solar eclipse.

It registers gifts of land, house-site, oil-mill and toll incomes made by Manneya Viruparasa of Baisa-Kula, his senior Heggaḍe and Dēsiya-daṇṇāyaka Nannarasa, chief Karaṇas and other officers, Prabhu Sōmayya with the Mūligas, eight Hiṭṭus, all the residents, and Mummuridaṇḍas to Amṛitarāśi-paṇḍita for repairs, worship; and offerings in the temple of Trikūṭa, consisting of Māchēśvara, Mallikārjuna and Mādhava, constructed by Mācharasa, the Prabhu of the mahāgrāma Miṇiñjige included in Hagariṭṭage-300, which was under the administration of Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipatī Kumāra Nara-Nārasimha. The gift is stated to have been made at the request of Mudrahasta Viṭhṭharasa-daṇḍanāyaka, while the king was camping at Maṁjaratīrtha on the bank of the Gōdāvarī. There is reference to Kalachuri Siṁha-bhūpāḷa in line 29. The epigraph is partly worn out, particularly in the early portion of it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
baicaṇa nripāḷaṁ
worn out
nēṁ pratāpiyō .
raseyaṁ rakṣipa māḷkeyiṁ di
baḷaṁ daṁḍanātha cūḍāmaṇiya
kaḷacuriya siṁhabhūpāḷa
ḷikege yoḷarebraṁhma
hayya bhūṣaṇa baḷiya
nnakuṁdeya vibhu sōma
paṁnaṇaṁ . kaṁ . A nu gravairigaḷano
ṭṭajiyiṁ taridikki mikka dhātrī tayasaṁ svadha
rmmadoḷe rakṣisidaṁ prajeyaṁ niraṁtaraṁ . gatara
ppa tatpādapadmōpajīnigaḷoḷage . vri . śrī veṁ nagaḷda māreya
bhaṭṭadaṁḍanāthāgraṇiyātmajaṁ parasurāmaparākrama jagadēkamallajaya
siṁhanripāḷana vajranaṇaṁ biṭṭimayya guṇaṁ raṇāgraṇi malleya bha
ṭṭaruṁ janaṁ pogaḷe mācayabhaṭṭaneṁbī jayasiṁhaṁ nayavidaṁ mānu kanenisi
ppa mārayabhaṭṭaṁ nirupamaparākrama cidda rāja yiṁ bāṇā
sanavidyeyoḷatijāṇaṁ yōdhādhināyaka rakṣō ṇiparalli ciddadaṁḍādhīśaṁ .
tattenayanabhinutaṁ viprōttamanakhiḷārtthiśaraṇa pudu mā
cibhaṭṭanatiśaya mallaṁge negaḷdamāciyabhaṭṭaṁ sā
hityanuditevidyāsāhasanudagra pūjevaḍedaṁ sabheyoḷu . Anupama vidyeyoḷkula
doḷaṁmminūḷārppinoḷu janapati kīrttiyoḷuṁ natiyo
ḷu pratāpadoḷu daṁḍanāthariṁ ni nāthananeṁde baṁṇnikuṁ vibudha
saṁstutanaṁ kaṭakābjabhānuvaṁ . A mahimārṇnavaniṁdaṁ janisi mahiyoḷu negaḷda
nuditakīrttivitānaṁ bhīmaparākramanadaṭaṁ sāmānyane mallidēvadaṁḍādhīśanu . paḍiyaṟara
dhiṣṭapathamaṁ paḍedaṁ rājyavoḍeyaṁ tānene paḍeyaṁ naḍaysidaṁ citrakana karaṁ
ḍakarāgraṁ . cōḷana goṁḍu muttina chatrayugmamaṁ cāḷukyacakri me
cci kuḍe tāṁ paḍedaṁ balagarvva paggadāyatikevettabhimāna vikramōnnataṁ līleyiṁ malli
dēvavibhuvesedaṁ kaṭakābjabhāskaraṁ . Ā mahimōnnataṁge satigaṁ yaruṁdati gaṁgagau
riyaṁbī mahimūspa �yāda mahānbhāveyā dēvara dēviyuṁ � bijjaladēvi
yumoppuva bācaladēviyuṁ guṇāgraṇi mahāsati caṁddaladēviyeṁbaru . Esa
vā bācaladēvigagratanayaṁ tējōdhikaṁ sōmanī vasudhācakradoḷatyudāracari� gādaṁ magaṁ bācaṇaṁ vi
ṣamēṣu pratimānarūpavibhavaṁgātmōdbhavaṁ sōmanārppasakaṁ bettudanūnasāhasa
dhanaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭa kalpadrumaṁ .

Aṁtā caṁdaladēviganaṁtaguṇānvitananippa malla
rasaṁgaṁ kāmanibhamūrti puṭṭi samaṁtesedaṁ
mācirājanūrjitatējaṁ . guṇamaṇibhūpā
tattanujanāhavabhīṣaṇaṁ dvijāgraṇinā
gōtranudāri jagatupavitra
ṇita kīrtti samanvi
dhātri kuṟugōḍu baṇni
su yya tigmarōciyaṁ .
vibhavōṁnati pecce
vāleyamaṁ
ḍisi dāragavepparē
jagadoḷu ta kauśika
gōtrabhaya guṇaniḷayaṁ
mitra janamitraṁ māca
rasanu vīra śriyādēvi
ya putraru mādēvatāpatige bhaktaraca
ḷitavibhava mācirājana tanaya
mahādēvana guṇagaṇaniḷaya
ru . śrī mācēśanu mallināthanenipī sā
dhyaliṁgaṁgaḷaṁ śrīmanu mādhavamū
rttiyaṁ kramadoḷī traikūṭadēvāleyaṁ
tāvoppa berasippenaṁ mahimeyiṁdaṁ
mācirājaṁ yaśōdhāmaṁ māḍi
sidaṁ vicitramenalā kaiḷāsasaiḷōpamaṁ .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaranativiṣamahayārūḍha
prauḍharēkhārēvanta . vijayalakṣmīkānta nītipā
rāvārapārāyaṇaṁ . rūpanārāyaṇaṁ
saṁgrāmarāma[ṁ .] parabaḷabhīma[ṁ .] sāhasōttuṁ
ganarātivana mattamātaṁga baisakuḷakama
ḷamārttaṁḍa . śrīmatu kapāḷēsvaradēvara pādā
rādhakaṁ manneya bhairavaṁ śrīmatu virupa
rasara mahimōṁnnatiyeṁteṁdoḍe . sale nile
vīralakṣmigenisirppu hūḷadoḷō
lagadi kūrttu doḷaṁ biḍadippaḷa
na lakṣmi taṁnolavinoḷāvagaṁ bayasi
suttuvaḷelliya kīrttilakṣmiyaggalisida be
ṭṭarā yaroḷāṟuṁ sukhaṁ virupā
kṣanirppudu . svasti samastabhuvanāśra
yaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhi
rājaparamēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
srayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalla vīrasōmē
svaradēvarā vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi pra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re gōdāvarītīrada maṁjaratīrtthada nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire
sakavarṣada 1107 neya krōdhi saṁvatsa
rada kārtika bahuḷa Amāvāsa sōmavā
rasūryyagrahaṇa nimittadiṁ śrīmanumahā
pradhānaṁ sēnādhipati kumāraṁ naranāra
siṁhadēvaru hagaraṭṭi munnūṟaṁ duṣṭani

graha śiṣṭapratipālanadiṁdāḷuttamiralu
mudrahasta viṭhṭharasadaṁḍanāyakara biṁnnapa
diṁ hagariṭṭage munnūṟaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ mahā
grāmaṁ miṇiṁjigeya prabhu mācarasa
yyaṁgaḷu māḍisida trikūṭavarppa māca
ra śrī mācēsvaradēvarggaṁ mallikārjjunadēva
rggaṁ mādhavadēvarggaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita jī
rnnōdhdhārakkaṁ trikālapūje naivēdyakkaṁ sarvva
namasyavāgi maṁneya virupadēvara
saruṁ Avara hiriya heggaḍe dēsiya daṇnāya
ka nannarasaruṁ pramukha karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ taṁtrapā
ḷaṁ cikkeyanāyakanuṁ heggaḍe saṁkayyanuṁ
māleya sāvantanuṁ Alliya prabhu sōma
yya mukhyavāgi mūligaruṁ Eṁṭu hiṭṭuṁ samasta pra
jegaḷuṁ nāḍa seṭṭigutta baṁmiseṭṭi māceseṭṭi muṁ
muridaṁḍaṁgaḷu mukhyavāgi Amritarā
si paṁḍitargge kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi biṭṭa māṇikēśvarada kōlalu taṁbadaḍiya sī
meyiṁ teṁkalu satrada keyiṁ paḍuvalu liṁga
mudreya kalliṁ baḍagalu beḷahanūra sīmayiṁ
mūḍalu māṇikēsvarada kōlalu biṭṭa mattaru
yippattu 24 Ā kōlalu dēvara tōṭa kō
ṭeya dāriyiṁ teṁka ḍōṇiyiṁ paḍuvalu ma
ttaroṁdu Ā dēvariṁ paḍuvalu yavarige
nivēsanaveraḍu Alliṁ paḍuvalu mālagāṟa ma
llaṇaṁge nivēsanavoṁdu dēvara nityāvaḷi vīḷe
yakke biṭṭaṁgaḍivoṁdu dēvara naṁdādīvi
gege biṭṭa gāṇavoṁdu dēvara caitrapavitra
kke mattaṁ kuṟibagāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ bēḍaruṁ
huliya jaṁguḷiya nāmikaru mādegaru
sahita jātivarggadalu hosatilalu biṭṭa hāga
voṁdu hoṁge hattaḍake hēriṁgayvatte
le matta dēvargge Āya hoṁge koṭṭalli vommā
na koṁḍalli vommāna hoṁge sollage me
ḷasu gāṇadalu sauṭigeṇne yintī dharmmavanāva
kāladoḷāḷvarasugaḷuṁ mannayaruṁ svadha
rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvavargge vāraṇāsi
kurukṣētra gaṁgātīradalli sahasrakavileya
kōḍumaṁ koḷagumaṁ suvarṇnadalu kaṭṭi ratnaṁga
ḷalu khaciysi caturvēdapāragarappa
brāhmaṇargge kṣīrabhōjanavikki dānaṁgoṭṭa
phalavakku yī dharmmakkāvanāgiyaṁ pratikū
lanāgi kiḍsidavanu sahasrakavileymaṁ caturvvē
da pāragarappa brāhmaṇarumaṁ vāraṇāsi
yalu Aḷida dōśaṁ sārggu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarśa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . Abhavaṁgāḷva keyga
ḷoḷu managaḷoḷpūdōṁṭadoḷu grāmadūḷku
prabhu mēṇmaṁneyanakke nāḍarasarakkāra(rā)doḍaṁ dōsa
meṁdu bhayaṁgoḷḷadaḷivaṁ bēḷvānaraṁ svāna gā
rddabha cāṁḍālanavaṁge piṁgadenasuṁ
janmāṁtaraṁ kāravaṁ . maṁgaḷamahā śrī [.]
Digital edition of SII 15.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
